resources.string: Choose which marketplace events send you notifications. Disabled topics are still recorded in your inbox.
Suspension, ban, and reactivation notices for your account.
Capability and payout changes on your connected Stripe account.
An auction you bid on has been cancelled.
An auction you bid on or watched has closed.
Another bidder has placed a higher bid than yours.
A new bid was placed on one of your auctions.
Decisions on listings you posted or appealed.
New messages from buyers or sellers in your threads.
Shipping, delivery, dispute, and refund updates on orders you placed.
New orders, dispute openings, and refund requests on items you sell.
Updates on reports you have filed.
Notices when a report names you as the target.
New reviews written about you by buyers or sellers.
Replies to reviews you have written.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you bought.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you sell.
Activate your account to start buying and selling.
We\'ll automatically raise your bid by the smallest amount needed to stay ahead, up to this maximum.
Your bid was placed but immediately outbid. Another bidder has a higher maximum. Their bid is now %1$s.
Reach buyers and sell your items on Mochi. Payments are handled securely via Stripe.
Create your seller profile to start listing items
Link a Stripe account to accept payments from buyers
Stripe charges its own processing fee per transaction and a flat fee per chargeback. Current rates for your currency and region are listed in your Stripe Dashboard.
Some actions, including creating new listings and completing orders, are restricted while your account is in this state.
Enter an amount higher than the current bid
No browser available to open payment page
Payment checkout could not be started — the seller may not have completed payment setup
Enter your country to see shipping options
This will permanently delete the listing.
Connect a Stripe account to receive payouts on this listing.
Try adjusting or clearing your filters.
Platform fee: %1$s%%. See your Stripe dashboard for processor fees.
Whole-currency amounts. The market filters in the listing\'s own currency.
This seller is banned. New orders cannot be placed.
This seller is suspended. New orders are paused until the account is reinstated.
Buying is disabled while the seller\'s account is restricted.
This permanently removes the draft from your account.
Tap New listing to create your first item.
When you message a seller (or a buyer messages you) the thread will appear here.
Your bank filed a chargeback on this order. Stripe is handling the dispute with the seller; the outcome will appear here when it\'s decided.
Hidden until the seller reviews you, or after 14 days.
Help future buyers — share how this order went.
Provide a reason for your refund request.
Leave blank to refund the full order.
Buyers and sellers can review each other after a completed order.
Open a completed order to leave a review.
Stripe processor fees are shown in your Stripe dashboard.
You can respond once. Replies are public.
Orders from your published listings show up here.
Tap the bookmark icon on any listing to save it for later.
Finish your Stripe onboarding before you can accept payouts.
Subscribers to your listings show up here.
This will cancel your subscription. You will lose access at the end of your current billing period.
Cancels at the end of the current period
Subscriptions are recurring purchases — sellers list them with monthly or yearly pricing.
Pre-fills on future checkouts once checkout integration is added.
Used for invoices and tax compliance. Not shown on your public profile.
Connect Stripe to start listing items and receiving payments.
Create a seller account to list items and reach buyers.
More seller account controls will appear here as they become available.
Create your seller profile before connecting payments.
Your seller setup is complete. You can manage Stripe or check your latest account status here.
Create your seller profile to start listing items
Link a Stripe account to accept payments from buyers
Stripe needs more information before you can accept payments. Complete the requirements on your Stripe Dashboard, then click Check status.
